placement_rules.asar: Electron main/preload and copied JSON/CJS dependencies only; no generated source/test/map/cache files
placement_rules.asar_unpacked: Only entries explicitly listed under unpacked_entries; native/WASM is empty until a platform/arch/ABI/hash entry exists
placement_rules.extra_resources: backend executable, worker, fusion manifest and contract resources are outside app.asar under Resources/
placement_rules.resolution: package-relative paths are resolved from process.resourcesPath; package miss, path escape, platform/arch mismatch or hash mismatch is fatal
placement_rules.external_fallback: forbidden; no process.cwd, HOME, PATH, .claude, AgentOS, CLI, daemon or runtime-install discovery

forbidden_fallback_scan.note: B12 records the contract only; process-route/static scan belongs to the routing/signing-prep worker.

signing_boundary.mutation_policy: Any post-sign mutation to listed content, manifest or container invalidates the candidate and maps to release_blocked_signing.

allowlist.contract: This manifest is the hash-bearing readback projection of the B12 allowlist; source bindings below retain non-runner source identity.
